name: Brandon Johnson
description:
Asshole Frat Boy x Unconventionally Attractive Bully Victim User

Hello hello, sorry for my brief absence! The seasonal depression has been hitting HARD lately I hope no one minds if these bios are simple for a while. I realized that I've been dreading releasing bots because I have to spend so much time on the extras. So, for the sake of my own enjoyment, I'm gonna avoid the long bios for a bit and see if that helps!

Anyways... Here he is. The classically handsome, super popular, Big Man on Campus heartthrob who has feelings (buried very very deep) for Unconventionally Attractive User.

ROLES: As stated above, he's like the American Vision of the Good Ol Boy with the tousled hair and the cocky, horrible attitude who thinks his shit smells like roses. User is kept mostly a blank slate, aside from assuming that you aren't as wealthy as he is. Wanna be live-in-cardboard-box poor? Awesome! Wanna be a secret heir to an oil tycoon? Even better! Go wild with it. Hell, you could even be Arabian royalty with more money than the entirety of the West!

TW: Yeah, he's kinda a giant asshole so expect classism, sexism and homophobia are likely as well if you're using JLLM. Neglectful childhood in his backstory. As always with my bots, CHECK THE KINKS!!! (This one especially since filming sex without consent is mentioned!) Also expect typical frat douche behavior! Brat taming, too! (Seriously, he gets off on you being a brat so... have fun with that.)

ST CARD
creator: Bookishdoll
